creator: dhagan@cs.vt.edu
text:
Here's a patch for the port to htdig 3.1.4.  Also available from
http://www.cs.vt.edu/~dhagan/freebsd/ (by PR number) in case the mailers
munge it.

Daniel

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /src/cvs/ports/textproc/htdig/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.12
diff -c -r1.12 Makefile
*** Makefile	1999/12/10 20:07:19	1.12
--- Makefile	2000/01/18 19:41:06
***************
*** 6,12 ****
  # $FreeBSD: ports/textproc/htdig/Makefile,v 1.12 1999/12/10 20:07:19 billf Exp $
  #
  
! DISTNAME=	htdig-3.1.3
  CATEGORIES=	textproc www
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.htdig.org/files/ \
  		${MASTER_SITE_SUNSITE} \
--- 6,12 ----
  # $FreeBSD: ports/textproc/htdig/Makefile,v 1.12 1999/12/10 20:07:19 billf Exp $
  #
  
! DISTNAME=	htdig-3.1.4
  CATEGORIES=	textproc www
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.htdig.org/files/ \
  		${MASTER_SITE_SUNSITE} \
***************
*** 15,24 ****
  		ftp://ftp.loxinfo.co.th/pub/unix/www/ \
  		ftp://ftp.htdig.org/pub/htdig/
  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	apps/www/indexing
- 
- PATCH_SITES=	http://www.htdig.org/files/contrib/other/
- PATCHFILES=	htdig-3.1.3-urlparmbug.patch
- PATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
  
  MAINTAINER=	billf@FreeBSD.org
  
--- 15,20 ----
